summary: Card games beta audit (REPORT-ONLY) — Jan 2026. Tested 20 game routes via demo login on preview URL. Captured page render, deal/start button, bet/wager UI, sequential dealing animation timing (cards in DOM at t=0/2s/5s), and console errors. Backend routes verified mounted (auth-protected = 401 healthy). Regression shield: 194/220 PASS (26 FAIL — NOT 220/220 as expected by founder).

overall_verdict.betting_ui_present_on_betting_games: 8/9 (Caribbean Stud, Casino War, Chemin de Fer, Big Six Wheel, Cyber BJ, Practice BJ, 3-Card Poker, Practice Baccarat, Poker Practice all show bet UI; missing on poker-practice deal-trigger)

verdict_per_game.ai_flip_anim: not separately measured, deal animation visible

verdict_per_game.deal_anim: INSTANT_FLASH ❌ (0→9→9 cards: all dealt within 2s — NOT staggered as founder requested)
NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s ⚠ (deal button click did not result in visible cards via standard selectors — likely needs bid/trump pick first OR uses non-standard card classes)
NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s ⚠ (dominoes != cards; selector mismatch — manual visual check required)
NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s ⚠ (likely lobby/start screen — second click needed)
NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s ⚠ (page title is generic landing — render may have failed; manual visual check needed)
NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s ⚠ (1 placeholder card pre-deal; click likely requires ANTE bet first)
NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s ⚠ (probably needs Player/Banker bet selection before deal fires)
INSTANT_FLASH ❌ (0→10→10 cards within 2s — 5 player + 5 dealer flashed at once)
NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s (auto-bet was 100 Vibez but click on 'Deal · 100 Vibez' didn't render cards within 5s — needs manual check; backend may be processing)

founder_dealing_concern_status.request: 'Everything don\'t flip over fast. Each person get their turn flipping over.' Founder wants visible per-card delay (≥80ms) during deal.

backend_health.regression_shield: 194/220 PASS, 26 FAIL — NOT GREEN. Failures are mostly module-import / mounting / sovereign-validator type errors (test_pinochle_engine_boots, test_hearts_engine_boots, test_dominoes_engine_boots, test_gin_rummy_to_view_exposes_meld_groups, test_rummy_to_view_exposes_meld_groups, test_card_multiplayer_routes_mounted, test_vibe_654_*, test_v8_gisa_agent_module_imports, test_v8_localization_canonical_country_matrix, test_sovereign_*, test_chair_ladder_is_final_3_tier_shape, test_tictactoe_5_in_a_row_locked, test_bridge_enforces_30_day_maturity_lock, test_v10_solana_bridge_constants_and_endpoint, test_wallet_field_helper_adopted_across_routes). Game-engine boot failures (Pinochle/Hearts/Dominoes engine boots) directly explain why those AAA routes show 'NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s'.
backend_health.endpoint_smoke: All practice routes (/api/uno-practice, /api/hearts-practice, /api/crazy-eights-practice, /api/euchre-practice, /api/gin-rummy-practice, /api/rummy-practice, /api/go-fish-practice, /api/pinochle-practice, /api/dominoes-practice, /api/war-practice) return 401 unauthorized = mounted & healthy. /api/spades-practice returns 404 (route prefix mismatch — actual prefix is '/spades' or '/spades-practice/legacy'). /api/blackjack/* and /api/baccarat/* return 404 on /state — endpoints likely use POST /start or other paths.

console_errors_pattern: All 20 routes show identical recurring browser warnings: 'WebSocket connection to wss://.../api/ws/vibe-phone/<demo_id> failed' and '/api/ws/friend-events/<demo_id> failed'. These are NOT game-blocking but indicate the WS endpoints are either unmounted or auth-rejecting demo users. Recommend investigating ws/vibe-phone and ws/friend-events handlers — they fire on every page mount.
critical_code_review_comments: Founder asked for 220/220 regression_shield GREEN before beta — currently 26 RED including 3 game-engine boot failures (pinochle, hearts, dominoes). Must triage before opening beta.

Sequential dealing is implemented in SpadesAAA / HeartsAAA / BidWhistAAA but missing in UNO, Crazy Eights, Gin Rummy, Rummy, Caribbean Stud. Founder explicitly called this out — fix the deal-loop in those 5 components to match the Spades/Hearts pattern (likely a setTimeout/await pattern in handleDeal()).
/poker-practice has bet UI but no Deal/Start/Play button discoverable via standard selectors — broken hook-up.
Engine boot failures for hearts/pinochle/dominoes in regression_shield correlate with NO_CARDS_AFTER_5s on those AAA routes — possibly the same root cause (missing module).

Universal vibe-phone & friend-events WebSocket warnings on every page — anonymous/demo users likely can't authenticate to those WS, but the components attempt connection regardless. Add demo_user gating.
action_items_for_main_agent: Restore 26 failing tests in /app/backend/tests/regression_shield.py (3 game-engine boots: Pinochle, Hearts, Dominoes; meld_groups view exposure for Gin Rummy / Rummy; multiple sovereign + v8 + v10 + v12 import / wiring failures).
Add slow-deal staggered animation to: UNO AAA, Crazy Eights AAA, Gin Rummy AAA, Rummy AAA, Caribbean Stud — match the Spades/Hearts/BidWhist pattern (per-card ≥80–150ms delay).

Manual visual confirm needed for: Euchre AAA, Dominoes AAA, Go Fish AAA, Pinochle AAA, Practice Blackjack, Practice Baccarat, 3-Card Poker, Casino War, Chemin de Fer, Cyber Casino Blackjack — automated 5s deal-window did not show cards (likely needs bet placement step before deal fires; need a human pass to confirm sequential vs flash).
Investigate /api/ws/vibe-phone and /api/ws/friend-events failures for demo users — appears on every page.
code_modifications: NONE — report-only pass per founder instructions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent fixes the 5 instant-flash games (UNO/CrazyEights/GinRummy/Rummy/Caribbean Stud) and the 3 engine boot regressions (Pinochle/Hearts/Dominoes), re-run this audit. Card-counting via DOM at t=0/2s/5s after deal click works well: cards 0→0→13 = STAGGERED (good); cards 0→13→13 = INSTANT_FLASH (bad). For games requiring bet placement first (BJ/Baccarat/Stud/War), the script must select a chip then click Deal — that step was skipped. The /api/ws/vibe-phone & /api/ws/friend-events warnings are universal and unrelated to game logic.
